title: SWD club cricket fixtures: 7 and 8 February
description: CLUB CRICKET NEWS - The premier league...
bodyText:
CLUB CRICKET NEWS - The premier league fixture between Sussex and Knysna Cavaliers at D’Almeida promises to be a mouthwatering clash this weekend.


> Pacaltsdorp, who is the top performer this season, will host Harlequins.


New Dawn Park will have the opportunity to move away from the bottom of the log when they take on George at Rooirivierrif.

The semi-finals in the Reserve Division 1 and 2 competition are scheduled for the weekend.

The complete list of fixtures is:


> Saturday 7 February


Premier League: Pacaltsdorp United vs Harlequins Forces; George vs New Dawn Park, Sussex vs Knysna Cavaliers; Union Stars II vs Union Stars I

Promotion League: Plett Pioneers vs Ladismith; Mossel Bay vs George B; Heidelberg United vs Riversdale; Thembalethu vs Pirates United; Ramblers vs NMU Madibaz George

Reserve League Division 1 (semi-final): Mayflower vs Harlequins Forces C; Beaufort West vs Western Hope

Reserve League Division 2 (semi-final): Knysna Cavaliers B vs Sussex B; Calitzdorp Young Stars A vs Sussex C

Women’s Division 1: Knysna Cavaliers vs Sussex

Women’s Division 2: Dysselsdorp vs Harlequins Forces


> Sunday 8 February


Women’s Division 1: Pacaltsdorp United vs Sussex

Women’s Division 2: Plett Pioneers vs New Dawn Park

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
